channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spiritual Significance and Rewards of the Last 20 Days of Ramadan
item.description: As Ramadan enters its final twenty days, Tanzanian Muslims, like believers worldwide, experience heightened spiritual reflection and devotion. By this stage, the body has grown accustomed to fasting, ...

item.title: Retired Bahria Town Official Sentenced to 10 Years for Money Laundering
item.description: ISLAMABAD: In a significant legal development, an additional sessions court has convicted retired Colonel Khalilur Rehman, the vice chief executive of Bahria Town, in a major money laundering case. Th...

item.title: California Residents Will Move Clocks Forward as Daylight Saving Time Begins
item.description: On Sunday, Californians will once again adjust their clocks forward by one hour for the start of daylight saving time at 2 a.m. Despite widespread public frustration, legislative efforts to eliminate ...

item.title: US Embassy Advises Americans in the Philippines to Exercise Caution Following Middle East Tensions
item.description: The United States Embassy in the Philippines has issued a safety advisory for Americans living in the country following recent military actions by the US and Israel against Iran. The advisory, release...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Raises Fuel Price to ₦995 per Litre Amid Global Oil Shortage
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery don raise price of premium motor spirit (PMS) to ₦995 per litre, na second time dem don increase am for just four days. Before now, dem increase am from ₦774 to ₦874 per lit...

item.title: Central Karoo Faces Health and Economic Challenges Despite Provincial Growth
item.description: The Western Cape Municipal Economic Review and Outlook, presented in the provincial Parliament on 6 March 2026, reveals a mixed picture for the province. While the Western Cape as a whole reports mode...

item.title: At Least 8 Killed by Tornadoes from Severe Storms in Central US, Including Michigan and Oklahoma
item.description: Severe thunderstorms spawned multiple destructive tornadoes across parts of the central United States on Thursday and Friday, resulting in at least eight fatalities and numerous injuries. In southwest...

item.title: Expert Advice on Maintaining Healthy Urination Habits
item.description: Urination is a vital bodily function, and its proper management is essential for overall health. Experts emphasise monitoring urine colour as a practical indicator of hydration: light yellow suggests ...

item.title: The Argyle Library Egg: How One Man's Obsession with a Jewelled Masterpiece Ruined His Family Business and Marriage
item.description: In this extract from her memoir, Serena Kutchinsky recounts her father Paul's ambitious creation of the Argyle Library Egg, recognised as the world's largest jewelled egg. Inspired by Carl Fabergé, Pa...

item.title: Recommended Lightweight Concealers for a Natural, Minimal Makeup Look
item.description: This HuffPost article highlights the best lightweight concealers ideal for achieving a 'no makeup' makeup appearance that looks fresh and natural without feeling heavy or cakey. Written by Griffin Wyn...

item.title: Eight boys arrested for fatally stabbing Class 10 student in Madhya Pradesh
item.description: In a tragic incident reported from Madhya Pradesh, a Class 10 student was brutally stabbed to death by a group of boys. The police have taken swift action and detained eight individuals in connection ...

item.title: Courage and Resistance: Iranian Women’s National Football Team Faces Backlash

item.title: Revisiting America's Next Top Model: Opportunities, Criticism, and Contestant Well-being
item.description: America's Next Top Model first aired in 2003 and became one of those shows we all watched, dreaming of models and glamour. But now, Netflix has released a docuseries called Reality Check: Inside Ameri...

item.title: Jailed PTI Leaders Call for National Unity and Dialogue Amid External Threats and Economic Challenges

item.title: Zikoko unveils second season of HER docuseries highlighting Nigerian women entrepreneurs
item.description: Zikoko, one of the main brands under Big Cabal Media, don release the second season of their docuseries wey dem call 'HER'. This season dey focus on five Nigerian women wey don sabi build strong busin...

item.title: Actors who have publicly expressed regret over some of their most well-known film roles
item.description: The article explores instances where well-known actors have voiced regrets about participating in certain films, despite their fame or success. It begins by noting recent examples, such as Ryan Reynol...

item.title: Ugandan NGO ECOTRUST Empowers Communities with Conservation Financing at Nairobi Conference

item.title: Clash During Holi in Uttam Nagar Leaves One Dead, Several Arrested
item.description: In Uttam Nagar, southwest Delhi, a clash occurred during Holi celebrations on March 4, 2026, between two neighbouring families who have had disputes for over fifty years. The incident resulted in the ...

item.title: U.S. Senator John Kennedy Praises Both U.S. and Canadian Teams After Olympic Men's Hockey Final
item.description: Following the recent Olympic men's hockey final in Turin, Italy, Republican Senator John Neely Kennedy from Louisiana publicly commended both the U.S. and Canadian teams for their performances. While ...
